name: dev-tools-skills
description: Development tools marketplace for Claude Code and VS Code Copilot - universal project init, project hook installation, git workflow, serial command execution loop, plugin management, Codex config sync, code annotation, Android and Flutter development tools

plugins.name: dev-tools-skills
plugins.description: All-in-one development toolkit: universal project init (dt:init), project hook installation (dt:install-project-hooks), study assistant (dt:study), git push (dt:push), serial command execution loop (dt:execute-loop), plugin management (dt:update-remote-plugins), Codex config sync (dt:codex-sync-push/pull), code annotation (dt:code-note), Cloudflare tunnel (dt:to-public-cloudflare), work report generator (dt:work-report), local worktree isolation (dt:local-worktree), Android tools (adt:*), and Flutter tools (fdt:*).
